title: bus.hearth.variant.voted v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api's reactor when the Android app casts an up/down vote on a council variant or proposal. The vote is informational — hearth-api routes it to the appropriate listener for scoring.

variant_id.description: Identifier of the variant or proposal being voted on.

note.description: Optional free-text note attached to the vote.

voted_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the vote was recorded.
